summary: The page has a clear conversion path, but proof and accessibility cues need stronger placement before the primary booking action.

findings.title: Hero promise lacks immediate proof
findings.evidence: The hero presents a consultation CTA before any review, credential, or trust signal is visible.
findings.impact: Users may hesitate before committing to the primary action because confidence-building evidence appears later.
findings.recommendation: Place one concise trust signal near the hero CTA and keep fuller proof in the following section.
findings.handoff: Use page-wireframe-planner to preserve the hero CTA while adding first-viewport proof.

findings.title: Form recovery guidance is underspecified
findings.evidence: The form shows required inputs but does not describe how validation errors are announced or recovered.
findings.impact: Keyboard and assistive technology users may not understand what changed after a failed submit.
findings.recommendation: Define inline error text, focus movement, and summary messaging for failed submission states.
findings.handoff: Use generate-interaction-audit-report for state-by-state form review.
